title: Technoblade Name Pigs
description: If You Put A Nametag Named Technoblade in a Pig it Converts in Technoblade
body:
### **TECHNOBLADE NEVER DIES**

This texture pack makes that when you name a pig Technoblade the pig get a crown, this is a tribute to Technoblade that died by cancer.


### OptiFine is **REQUIRED** for this pack

![https://optifine.net/home](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9be9c50fbf58c43a459095dc3c999af0b7ddf534.png)

If you like fabric or other mod loader ETF and EMF will be required

![https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a4c8451cf96f8364459cd36f7d6e371cc18fe40.png)

![https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db8929fe65d9e566fea6d91383489f7b4b198d2f.png)
